title: Airworthiness exception packet under signed-certificate rule

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the source packet for the airworthiness exception response.
success_criteria: Use the signed airworthiness certificate that directly authorizes the exception.
Preserve provenance for the selected packet.
hard_constraints: Do not use engineering planning worksheets as the exception record.
soft_preferences: Prefer the packet that can be attached directly to the regulator response.
forbidden_actions: Cite an unsigned planning worksheet as the airworthiness exception record.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that planning material informed the discussion but not the authorization.
evidence_requirements: The selected packet must authorize the exception directly.
stop_conditions: Stop after choosing one source packet.

corpus.title: Signed airworthiness certificate
corpus.text: Signed certificate: flight standards and compliance approved the airworthiness exception for aircraft AX-17.

corpus.title: Engineering planning worksheet
corpus.text: Worksheet: engineering expects the exception to clear soon and asks the team to prepare aircraft AX-17.
